# The world becomes one — and stays Asian {#sec-ch05}

> *Three oceans connect; silver welds the globe; the sink is still in Asia.*

::: {.callout-note}
## Draft pending
**Period:** c.1400–1600. This chapter is a stub. Draft it from the standardized template
(`_chapter-template.qmd`) using its story spine
(`teaching/ecu4413_world_econ/module_design/topic_05_story_spine_2026-06-19.md`), the matching topic brief, the
centre-of-gravity ledger, the data compendium, and `datasets_by_topic.md`.
:::
